message:
test(e2e): Enhance E2E test suite with export and clipboard tests

Expand E2E testing coverage with export functionality tests,
clipboard interaction tests, and improved test utilities.

- Add tests/e2e/exports/ directory for export testing
- Create copy-clipboard.spec.ts for clipboard operations
- Enhance password-flow.spec.ts and basic-render.spec.ts
- Update global-setup.ts and test-utils.ts
- Add .env.test for test environment configuration
- Update playwright.config.ts and package-lock.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+TEST_EXPORTS_DIR=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports
+TEST_EXPORT_PASSWORD=test-password-123
+TEST_EXPORT_TEST_BASIC=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports/test-basic.html
+TEST_EXPORT_TEST_ENCRYPTED=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports/test-encrypted.html
+TEST_EXPORT_TEST_TOOL_CALLS=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports/test-tool-calls.html
+TEST_EXPORT_TEST_LARGE=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports/test-large.html
+TEST_EXPORT_TEST_UNICODE=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports/test-unicode.html
+TEST_EXPORT_TEST_NO_CDN=/data/projects/coding_agent_session_search/tests/e2e/exports/test-no-cdn.html
\ No newline at end of file
